---
title: "freya.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\wardens\freya.py"
loc: 92
complexity: 18
logic_score: 5.17
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 4.01
overall_score: 1.00
---

## Intent
The `freya.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on FreyaWarden, scan. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via FreyaWarden, scan. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [re](file://re)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)

### Exports
- `FreyaWarden`
- `scan`
